name: @xsai-chromium-prompt/root
description: Chromium Prompt API wrapper makes it easy to use with xsai

scripts.build: pnpm run package:build && pnpm -r -F="./playground" run build
scripts.dev: pnpm run package:build && pnpm -r -F="./playground" run dev
scripts.publish: pnpm run package:build && cp ./README.md ./package/README.md && pnpm -r -F="./package" publish && rm ./package/README.md
